header.name: Jaya Simha Reddy Nandyala
header.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
header.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 6.5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and cloud-native solutions. Expertise in React, Next.js, Java Springboot, Python FastAPI, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure). Strong advocate of Test Driven Development (TDD) and Extreme Programming (XP) methodologies. Proven track record of translating complex business requirements into high-quality, production-ready features.

achievements: Pioneering AI-First Software Delivery practices, integrating AI tools to accelerate development cycles.
Architecting modern web applications using Next.js and React with TypeScript for enterprise retail clients following Agile and XP practices.
Building serverless backend services with FastAPI and AWS Lambda, leveraging DynamoDB for high-performance data persistence.
Establishing comprehensive E2E testing strategies using Playwright for robust test coverage.
Delivered end-to-end features for Wealth Management Application following TDD and XP methodologies.
Partnered with Business, Product, and Design teams to gather requirements and incorporate feedback iteratively.
Engineered Azure serverless functions in TypeScript and Python, optimizing performance for complex financial calculations.
Mentored a team of 5 interns in building data analytics dashboards using Azure App Insights, KQL, and Grafana.
Transformed feature specifications into fully functional, responsive UI components using React JS and Redux.
Implemented real-time data synchronization using SignalR, enabling push-based architecture for live updates.
Ensured application quality through comprehensive Unit, Security, and Accessibility testing (ADA compliance).
